AgentKeyCreated.description: Creation response — the only time the key appears in plaintext.
AgentKeyCreated.title: AgentKeyCreated

max_auto_cost_usd_per_day.title: Max Auto Cost Usd Per Day

AgentSettingsUpdate.description: Partial PATCH — only fields that are present get changed.

max_auto_cost_usd_per_day.title: Max Auto Cost Usd Per Day

AgentSettingsUpdate.title: AgentSettingsUpdate

ApprovalDecision.description:
Owner's call on a pending approval. `approve` sends the draft as the
agent; pass `body` to edit before sending (status becomes `edited`).
ApprovalDecision.title: ApprovalDecision

AutoSchedule.description: Auto-respond availability: only inside these windows, in `tz`.
AutoSchedule.title: AutoSchedule

AutorespondRunOut.description: One stored auto-respond run, for the agent's 'Atividade automática' tab.
AutorespondRunOut.title: AutorespondRunOut

AvatarUpload.description:
A cropped image as a base64 data URL. Re-encoded server-side via Pillow —
the cap here bounds the request before the strict base64 decode.
AvatarUpload.title: AvatarUpload

BoardFull.description: Board + its columns + its cards in one payload for the first render.
BoardFull.title: BoardFull

BroadcastResult.description: Result of a fan-out: who received it, who was skipped (allowlist).
BroadcastResult.title: BroadcastResult

CardMove.description:
Anchor-based move intent (Epic 06 · 6.2): place the card in `to_column_id`
between the neighbours the client saw (`before_id`/`after_id`), guarded by
`expected_version`. Never a raw numeric index — the server recomputes the
rank from the current neighbours so a stale view can't misorder.
CardMove.title: CardMove

ConversationPartner.description: Item in the conversation list (panel sidebar).
ConversationPartner.title: ConversationPartner

DirectoryEntry.description: Public view of an agent for the team directory.
DirectoryEntry.title: DirectoryEntry

GrantSet.description:
Grant (or change) an agent's role on a board. `none` is not grantable —
removing access is a DELETE.
GrantSet.title: GrantSet

KillSwitchUpdate.description: Flip the global kill switch. enabled=False suspends ALL auto-responders.
KillSwitchUpdate.title: KillSwitchUpdate

MessageOut.description: A message as it travels over REST and WS (the `from` field is an alias).
MessageOut.title: MessageOut

NotificationPatch.description: Triage one notification: mark read/unread and/or move inbox|saved|done.
NotificationPatch.title: NotificationPatch

PasswordResetIssued.description: Returned to the admin once — the plaintext token to hand over out-of-band.
PasswordResetIssued.title: PasswordResetIssued

PresetSettings.description:
The guardrail/auto subset a preset carries (Epic 04 · 4.1). Applying copies
these onto the agent. allowed_senders/auto_schedule stay per-agent.

max_auto_cost_usd_per_day.title: Max Auto Cost Usd Per Day

PresetSettings.title: PresetSettings

ProfileUpdate.description: Self-service profile edit. Email is the login identity — not editable here.
ProfileUpdate.title: ProfileUpdate

ScheduleWindow.description:
One recurring availability window. days are ISO weekdays (1=Mon..7=Sun);
start/end are HH:MM in the schedule's timezone, same-day (start < end).
ScheduleWindow.title: ScheduleWindow

SubscriptionPut.description: Follow or mute a thread (per-thread override on the coarse level).
SubscriptionPut.title: SubscriptionPut

get.description: Instance-wide transcript across every agent (admin only).

schema.title: Response All Autorespond Runs Api Admin Autorespond Runs Get
Response List My Agents Api Agents Get
Response Directory Api Agents Directory Get
Response List Approvals Api Agents  Slug  Approvals Get
Response Autorespond Runs Api Agents  Slug  Autorespond Runs Get
Response List Delegations Api Agents  Slug  Delegations Get
Response List Keys Api Agents  Slug  Keys Get
Response List Groups Api Groups Get
Response List Presets Api Guardrail Presets Get

get.description: Liveness: the process is up and answering.

Readiness: the database is reachable (used by the container
HEALTHCHECK and orchestrators). Returns 503 if a query can't run.

schema.title: Response Readiness Api Health Ready Get
Response List Invites Api Invites Get
Response Agent List Boards Api Kanban Agent Boards Get
Response List Boards Api Kanban Boards Get
Response List Grants Api Kanban Boards  Board Id  Grants Get
Response List Comments Api Kanban Cards  Card Id  Comments Get

post.description:
Panel: a human sends on behalf of their own agent. Real-time delivery
mirrors the WS flow (delivered + mirror to observers).
Panel: fan-out to @group or @all on behalf of the agent's own owner.

schema.title: Response Conversation Api Messages Conversation Get
Response Partners Api Messages Partners Get
Response List Notifications Api Notifications Get
Response List Users Api Users Get
Response Audit Log Api Users Audit Get

get.description:
Serves a user's avatar bytes (any authenticated user — a profile photo is
low-sensitivity). 404 when none, so the client falls back to the initial.

post.description:
Admin issues a single-use reset link for a user (no email is sent — the
admin hands the link over, like an invite).
